paper.title_en: On conformal symmetry in large-$N$ quiver mechanics
paper.abstract_en: The microscopic description of extremal supersymmetric black holes in AdS$_2$/CFT$_1$ holography has remained elusive despite recent progress in the statistical description of near-extremal black hole physics. In this work we revisit Denef's quiver mechanics description of D-brane bound states in the Coulomb branch, which displays an emergent conformal symmetry in the AdS$_2$ scaling limit. This conformal symmetry is however broken by superpotential corrections near the locus where the Coulomb and Higgs branches meet, and its significance has so far remained unclear. In order to to clarify this issue, we derive and interpret a fixed-point formula for the superconformal quiver index using localization techniques. Focusing on cyclic abelian quivers, we show that, in a certain large-$N$ limit (with the rank $N$ of the quiver gauge group), the fixed points are located in the regime where the conformal description is reliable. In this limit, our expression for the superconformal index precisely captures a contribution to the microscopic scaling BPS index derived by Beaujard, Mondal and Pioline, which was hitherto not visible on the Coulomb branch. Our results are hoped to provide a step towards a stringy realization of AdS$_2$/CFT$_1$ duality.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 论文涉及极端超对称黑洞的微观描述，使用局部化技术推导超共形团簇指数的定点公式，并在大N极限下捕捉到微观缩放BPS指数的贡献，有望推动AdS2/CFT1对偶的弦论实现。
decision.title_zh: 关于大-N 箭袋力学中的共形对称性
decision.abstract_zh: 尽管最近在近极端黑洞物理的统计描述方面取得了进展，但AdS$_2$/CFT$_1$全息中极端超对称黑洞的微观描述仍然难以捉摸。在这项工作中，我们重新审视了Denef在库仑分支中D-膜束缚态的箭袋力学描述，该描述在AdS$_2$标度极限中显示出一种涌现的共形对称性。然而，这种共形对称性被库仑分支和希格斯分支相遇的轨迹附近的超势修正所破坏，其意义至今仍不清楚。为了澄清这个问题，我们使用局部化技术推导并解释了一个超共形团簇指数的定点公式。聚焦于循环阿贝尔箭袋，我们证明，在某个大-$N$极限（箭袋规范群的秩为$N$）下，定点位于共形描述可靠的区域。在这个极限下，我们超共形指数的表达式精确地捕捉到了由Beaujard、Mondal和Pioline推导的微观缩放BPS指数的一个贡献，该贡献迄今为止在库仑分支上不可见。我们的结果有望为AdS$_2$/CFT$_1$对偶的弦论实现提供一步进展。
